name: USS SC-635 (SC-635)
events: 4 Jul 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS Mallard (T/Lt. M.V. Evans, USN) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR) and USS SC-657 (Lt.(jg) C.C. Peters, Jr., USNR).

29 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 540 (Ens. E.A. Uslar, USNR) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR).

30 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 540 (Ens. E.A. Uslar, USNR) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR).

31 Jul 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 540 (Ens. E.A. Uslar, USNR) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR).

1 Aug 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises in Panama Bay with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS SC 540 (Ens. E.A. Uslar, USNR) and USS SC-635 (Lt.(jg) H. Yaskin, USNR).
